footer.copyright: © 2026 Golden Dream Draw Ltd. All rights reserved. Golden Dream Draw is a skill-based competition platform. Not gambling. Licensed and regulated in the United Kingdom.
footer.tagline: Skill-based prize competitions for the UK. Premium prizes, transparent draws, and real winners — every time.

hero.subtitle: Answer a skill-based question, buy your ticket from just £1.99, and watch the live draw. Premium prizes. Real winners. Every week.
hero.trustedBadge: Trusted by 48,000+ players across the UK

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to win. No hidden fees. No gambling — every competition is skill-based and fully compliant with UK law.

step1.title: Pick Your Prize
step1.desc: Browse our curated selection of premium prizes — electronics, jewellery, fashion, and cash awards. Find the one you want and click to enter.

step2.title: Answer & Buy Tickets
step2.desc: Answer a simple skill-based question to qualify, then purchase your tickets securely. Each ticket costs just £1.99. Enter free by post, too.

step3.title: Watch the Live Draw
step3.desc: Tune in on draw day — we stream every result live so you can watch the winner announcement in real time.

trending.title: Pick your prize
trending.empty: No active competitions right now — check back soon

winners.title: Our Recent Winners
winners.subtitle: Real people winning real prizes. Could be you next.
winners.noWinners: No winners yet — be the first!

items.a: Golden Dream Draw is a skill-based competition platform. Unlike a lottery, you must answer a question correctly to enter, making it a competition of skill rather than chance.
No. Golden Dream Draw is a skill competition. UK law requires that winners are determined by skill, not purely by chance. Our skill question ensures compliance.
Browse competitions, select a prize, answer the skill question correctly, and purchase your ticket. You can also enter by free postal entry — see the Free Postal Entry page.
All winning entries are drawn live on YouTube. A random ticket number is selected from all valid entries. The complete draw is recorded and published.
Yes. UK regulations require a free postal entry route. Send your entry via postcard — full details on our Free Postal Entry page.
You must be 18 or older to enter any competition on Golden Dream Draw.

items.q: When do I receive my prize?
items.a: Winners are notified within 24 hours of the draw. Prizes are dispatched within 5 working days after winner verification.

ctaBanner.title: Never miss a draw
ctaBanner.subtitle: Get notified when new prizes drop. We'll send you a quick email — no spam, just the good stuff.

freePostalEntry.title: Free Postal Entry
freePostalEntry.subtitle: Enter any competition for free — no purchase necessary
freePostalEntry.intro: Under UK law, every skill-based competition must offer a free entry route. You can enter any of our competitions by post.

step1.title: Choose your competition
step1.desc: Pick any active competition from our Competitions page.

step2.title: Write your entry
step2.desc: On a postcard or piece of paper, write the following details clearly:

step3.title: Post it to us
step3.desc: Send your entry to the address below. It must arrive before the competition's draw date.

fields.competitionName: The name of the competition you're entering
fields.answer: Your answer to the skill question (A, B, C, or D)

freePostalEntry.address: Golden Dream Draw, PO Box 1234, London, SW1A 1AA, United Kingdom
freePostalEntry.deadlineText: Your postal entry must arrive before the competition's draw date. Entries received after the draw will not be valid.
freePostalEntry.equalChanceText: Postal entries have exactly the same chance of winning as paid entries. There is no disadvantage to entering for free.
